object.name: story
object.property: <model xmlns:easyform="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/easyform" xmlns:form="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/form" xmlns:i18n="http://xml.zope.org/namespaces/i18n" xmlns:indexer="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/indexer" xmlns:lingua="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/lingua" xmlns:marshal="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/marshal" xmlns:security="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/security" xmlns:users="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/users" xmlns="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/schema"> <schema> <field name="text" type="plone.app.textfield.RichText"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Story Text</title> </field> <field name="imageHome" type="plone.namedfile.field.NamedBlobImage"> <description>Dimensions: 268px x 150px</description> <required>False</required> <title>Homepage image (16:9)</title> </field> <field name="themes" type="zope.schema.Set"> <default/> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Themes</title> <value_type type="zope.schema.Choice"> <values> <element>Land</element> <element>Gender</element> <element>Energy</element> <element>Marine and Fisheries</element> <element>Natural Resources Economics</element> <element>Agriculture and Food Security</element> <element>Forestry</element> <element>Monitoring and Evaluation</element> <element>Biodiversity</element> <element>Social and Community-Based Development</element> <element>Democracy and Governance</element> <element>Global Climate Change</element> <element>Water and Sanitation</element> <element>Wildlife Trafficking</element> </values> </value_type> </field> <field name="regions" type="zope.schema.Set"> <default/> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Regions</title> <value_type type="zope.schema.Choice"> <values> <element>Africa</element> <element>Asia and Near East</element> <element>Europe and Eurasia</element> <element>Global</element> <element>Latin America and Caribbean</element> </values> </value_type> </field> <field name="publisher" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Publisher</title> </field> <field name="publisherurl" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>PublisherURL</title> </field> <field name="byline" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Byline</title> </field> <field name="sourceUID" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>SourceUID</title> </field> <field name="authorUID" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>AuthorUID</title> </field> <field name="badge" type="plone.namedfile.field.NamedBlobImage"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Badge</title> </field> <field name="implementing_partners" type="plone.app.textfield.RichText"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Implementing Partners</title> </field> </schema> </model>
